info.title: AI Job Board API
info.description: API for the AI Job Board application â€” browse job titles, search jobs, and submit applications.

get.summary: GET /api/admin/courses â€” list all courses (with optional role filter & pagination)

post.summary: POST /api/admin/courses â€” create a new course + optionally link to roles

get.summary: GET /api/courses — list courses by role with pagination

post.summary: In production: triggered by Vercel Cron or external scheduler
POST /api/match â€” accepts { cv_text } and returns mock job matches

get.summary: GET /api/matches â€” get current user's pending matches

patch.summary: PATCH /api/matches â€” approve or skip a match

post.summary: POST /api/profile â€” create or update user profile from CV data

post.description: Returns 409 if an admin with this email already exists. Password is hashed before storage.

put.description: Email and/or password can be updated. Returns 400 if nothing to update, 409 if email already taken.

get.summary: Get a single CV score by ID

post.description: Title name must be unique. Returns 409 if the title already exists.
Authenticates with email and password. Creates a signed session cookie on success. If no admins exist yet, bootstraps the first admin from environment variables.
Accepts multipart/form-data with name, email, position, type, salary, and resume file. Uploads the resume to Supabase Storage and stores the application.

get.description: Returns all jobs, optionally filtered by a title keyword (case-insensitive partial match).
